skills.name: arXiv Database Wrapper
skills.description: Fetch papers from arXiv by ID, or search arXiv by query
skills.summary: Fetch papers from arXiv by ID, or search arXiv by query

skills.name: Audit & Revise
skills.description: Drive the audit-and-revise flow — ingest → critique → plan → approve → run — for a scientific paper dropped into the ScienceSwarm dashboard. Nine-tool surface locked in plan §1.1.
skills.summary: Drive the audit-and-revise flow — ingest → critique → plan → approve → run — for a scientific paper dropped into the ScienceSwarm dashboard. Nine-tool surface locked in plan §1.1.

skills.name: bioRxiv / medRxiv Database Wrapper
skills.description: Fetch bioRxiv or medRxiv preprints by DOI, or search recent preprints
skills.summary: Fetch bioRxiv or medRxiv preprints by DOI, or search recent preprints

skills.name: Brain Maintenance
skills.description: Use when the user asks about brain health, brain score, missing embeddings, stale or orphan pages, broken links, citation cleanup, search quality, feature recommendations, or keeping gbrain up to date inside ScienceSwarm.
skills.summary: Use when the user asks about brain health, brain score, missing embeddings, stale or orphan pages, broken links, citation cleanup, search quality, feature recommendations, or keeping gbrain up to date inside ScienceSwarm.

skills.name: ChEMBL Database Wrapper
skills.description: Fetch ChEMBL compounds by molecule ID, or search ChEMBL molecules
skills.summary: Fetch ChEMBL compounds by molecule ID, or search ChEMBL molecules

skills.name: ClinicalTrials.gov Database Wrapper
skills.description: Fetch ClinicalTrials.gov studies by NCT ID, or search trials
skills.summary: Fetch ClinicalTrials.gov studies by NCT ID, or search trials

skills.name: Crossref Database Wrapper
skills.description: Fetch scholarly works from Crossref by DOI, or search Crossref by query
skills.summary: Fetch scholarly works from Crossref by DOI, or search Crossref by query

skills.name: Materials Project Database Wrapper
skills.description: Fetch materials from Materials Project by mp-id or search summaries by formula
skills.summary: Fetch materials from Materials Project by mp-id or search summaries by formula

skills.name: OpenAlex Database Wrapper
skills.description: Fetch OpenAlex works or authors, or search OpenAlex by query
skills.summary: Fetch OpenAlex works or authors, or search OpenAlex by query

skills.name: ORCID Database Wrapper
skills.description: Fetch ORCID public records by iD, or search ORCID people
skills.summary: Fetch ORCID public records by iD, or search ORCID people

skills.name: PDB Database Wrapper
skills.description: Fetch structures from RCSB PDB by PDB ID or search PDB entries
skills.summary: Fetch structures from RCSB PDB by PDB ID or search PDB entries

skills.name: Project Organizer
skills.description: Use when the user asks to organize a project, identify the main research threads, look for duplicate papers, or suggest the next pages or tasks worth creating inside ScienceSwarm.
skills.summary: Use when the user asks to organize a project, identify the main research threads, look for duplicate papers, or suggest the next pages or tasks worth creating inside ScienceSwarm.

skills.name: PubMed Database Wrapper
skills.description: Fetch papers from PubMed by PMID or DOI, or search PubMed by query
skills.summary: Fetch papers from PubMed by PMID or DOI, or search PubMed by query

skills.name: Research Radar
skills.description: Every N minutes, scan the scientist's tracked topics, query gbrain for relevant signals, synthesize a personalized briefing, and write it back to gbrain as a Timeline entry on each topic's concept page plus a briefings/ summary page.
skills.summary: Every N minutes, scan the scientist's tracked topics, query gbrain for relevant signals, synthesize a personalized briefing, and write it back to gbrain as a Timeline entry on each topic's concept page plus a briefings/ summary page.

skills.name: ScienceSwarm — Capture & Second Brain
skills.description: Help users capture research notes, papers, and ideas into the Second Brain. Use when someone asks about saving notes, uploading papers, brain setup, wiki pages, or knowledge management.
skills.summary: Help users capture research notes, papers, and ideas into the Second Brain. Use when someone asks about saving notes, uploading papers, brain setup, wiki pages, or knowledge management.

skills.name: ScienceSwarm — Dashboard
skills.description: Help users navigate and use the ScienceSwarm dashboard UI. Use when someone asks about the project workspace, settings, communications panel, or how to configure features in the web interface.
skills.summary: Help users navigate and use the ScienceSwarm dashboard UI. Use when someone asks about the project workspace, settings, communications panel, or how to configure features in the web interface.

skills.name: ScienceSwarm — Getting Started
skills.description: Help users install, configure, and run ScienceSwarm. Use when someone asks how to set up the project, run the dev server, connect services, or troubleshoot first-run issues.
skills.summary: Help users install, configure, and run ScienceSwarm. Use when someone asks how to set up the project, run the dev server, connect services, or troubleshoot first-run issues.

skills.name: ScienceSwarm — Research Radar
skills.description: Help users set up and use the Research Radar feature for personalized daily briefings. Use when someone asks about monitoring papers, getting research updates, configuring radar topics, or running on-demand briefings.
skills.summary: Help users set up and use the Research Radar feature for personalized daily briefings. Use when someone asks about monitoring papers, getting research updates, configuring radar topics, or running on-demand briefings.

skills.name: ScienceSwarm Evidence Triangulation
skills.description: Cross-check a scientific, mathematical, or engineering claim across independent primary sources before acting on it.
skills.summary: A reusable cross-host skill for validating claims against multiple independent sources and surfacing disagreements clearly.

skills.name: ScienceSwarm Paper To Plan
skills.description: Turn a paper, method, or technical writeup into a concrete reproduction or implementation plan with validation checkpoints.
skills.summary: A cross-host planning skill for moving from a source artifact to an executable reproduction or implementation plan.

skills.name: ScienceSwarm Research Reasoning
skills.description: Use optional reasoning prompt patterns for research questions without committing the project to a fixed UI workflow.
skills.summary: Optional reasoning patterns for evidence maps, design critique, next experiments, model-system fit, target prioritization, multimodal interpretation, and decision updates.

skills.name: Semantic Scholar Database Wrapper
skills.description: Fetch papers from Semantic Scholar by ID, or search Semantic Scholar by query
skills.summary: Fetch papers from Semantic Scholar by ID, or search Semantic Scholar by query

skills.name: UniProt Database Wrapper
skills.description: Fetch UniProtKB proteins by accession, or search UniProtKB
skills.summary: Fetch UniProtKB proteins by accession, or search UniProtKB
